name: Cheddar Cornmeal Muffins
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Unsalted butter, melted and cooled slightly
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Line twelve 1/3-cup muffin cups with paper or foil liners. Stir the first six ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined. Whisk buttermilk, butter, and egg together in a medium bowl until blended. Add this mixture to the dry ingredients and stir just until combined. Fold in grated cheddar cheese. Divide the batter equally among prepared muffin cups. Bake until tops are golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 20 minutes. Cool in the pan on a rack for 10 minutes before serving warm or at room temperature.
